name: Cycloastragenol retinal amyloid registry
summary: Completed randomized triple-masked parallel registry testing oral cycloastragenol against placebo for retinal amyloid index in Alzheimer disease.
population: 48 adults aged 50 to 70 years with retinal amyloid screening in an Alzheimer disease context

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry lists study completion on 2018-12-31 but had no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is telomerase-activator disease-boundary context, not a direct broad-aging result.
trial_details.why_it_matters: The registry was included in the watchlist gap as a telomerase-activator record, but its cycloastragenol/retinal-amyloid scope should not be conflated with direct TA-65 aging evidence.
